backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (dark theme, hero section, stats counters, product showcase, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary for the project's component and hook structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Solar Energy Premium Website' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navbar, HeroSection, StatsSection, ProductShowcase, SavingsCalculator, and ContactFooter into a single-page dark-mode solar energy website.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedBackgrou: Canvas-based animated background that renders a pulsing blue energy grid and twinkling star particles for use in the hero section.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Combined contact and footer section featuring a glassmorphic quote request form with submission state, company contact details, social media links, and a branded footer bar.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section combining the 3D solar model, animated background, Orbitron headline ('Power Your Future with Clean Solar Energy'), floating stat badges, and dual CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a glassmorphism style that changes on scroll, a 'Get a Quote' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a solar product with an image, badge, spec overlay, name, description, and a 'Learn More' action, supporting blue or gold glow color themes.
Section component that renders a grid of four ProductCards for the solar panel lineup, with staggered fade-in animations on scroll and a CTA button linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/SavingsCalculato: Interactive savings calculator section with sliders for monthly bill and panel count that computes and displays estimated monthly savings, annual savings, CO₂ reduction, payback period, and system size.
frontend/src/components/Solar3DModel.tsx: Three.js/React Three Fiber 3D scene rendering an animated sun orb with distorted material, orbital rings, a particle system, and a starfield background using @react-three/drei helpers.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: Statistics section that displays four animated count-up metric cards (energy saved, CO₂ reduced, homes powered, years of excellence) triggered when the section scrolls into view.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: React hook that animates a number from 0 to a target value over a configurable duration using requestAnimationFrame with an ease-out cubic curve.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to detect when a referenced element enters the viewport, with optional one-time trigger support.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this UI-only application.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Orbitron/Inter fonts, configures Tailwind layers, defines CSS custom properties for the dark theme (Electric Blue/Solar Gold brand tokens), and provides reusable utility classes for glassmorphism, glow effects, and buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Orbitron/Inter fonts, oklch-based brand color tokens (electric-blue, solar-gold, charcoal), glow box shadows, and custom keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a single-page premium solar energy website with dark glassmorphism UI, Three.js 3D hero, animated stats, product showcase, savings calculator, and required image assets.
